S.FORM: == Kakako pasiiked == sofol Śüü: ma'oripay, salawacan ÁēĆ:a'adopen, fawahan ťĖÄ:sakololay , opir Á∂Ī:pacocoay , mata Áõģ:tosa-sackih , ÁßĎ: fafoy, ŚĪ¨:fafoy, fafoy o otimo o micopcopay to hacal, maedeng 220 ko kasasiroma' nira, ona otimo tahanini i, tangasa 90% saheto o iraay ko cakecih , itini tona ci cakecihay a a'a'dopen o kolong ko saadihayay.
S.PHON: == kakako~u pasiik…ô…¨~…ģ == so~ufo~u…ĺ *: ma °o~uripaj, sa…ĺawa ¶an *:a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn, fawańßan *:sako~u…ĺo~u…ĺaj , o~upir *:pa ¶o~u ¶o~uaj , mata *:to~usa-sa ¶kińß , *: fafo~uj, *:fafo~uj, fafo~uj o~u o~utimo~u o~u mi ¶o~up ¶o~upaj to~u ńßa ¶a…ĺ, ma…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč *** ko~u kasasiro~uma ° nira, o~una o~utimo~u tańßanini i, taŇčasa **% sańß…ôto~u o~u iraaj ko~u ¶ak…ô ¶ińß , itini to~una ¶i ¶ak…ô ¶ińßaj a a °a °…¨~…ģo~up…ôn o~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ko~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj.
S.FORM: == Kakako pasiiked == sofol Śüü: ma'oripay, salawacan ÁēĆ:a'adopen, fawahan ťĖÄ:sakololay , opir Á∂Ī:pacocoay , mata Áõģ:tosa-sackih , ÁßĎ: fafoy, ŚĪ¨:fafoy, fafoy o otimo o micopcopay to hacal, maedeng 220 ko kasasiroma' nira, ona otimo tahanini i, tangasa 90% saheto o iraay ko cakecih , itini tona ci cakecihay a a'a'dopen o kolong ko saadihayay.
